subcodes.first_line: The purpose of the appearance of the holy Manifestations hath ever been the establishment of fellowship and love in the world of humanity
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای یاران رحمانی شمس حقیقت بر آفاق قلوب اشراق نورانیت محبت نمود و غمام موهبت
subcodes.subjects: @love, unity, and fellowship among the friends; in the Cause, @unity; oneness of humanity, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @quotation from or interpretation of the Bible
